Back Woods Events Mauled by wild animal (Lost Limb (2)] Industrial corporation forced you from your land but you fought back [Bad Reputation_ Enemy (21, Rifles Stealth +1] Caught avalanche (Choose one: Lost Limb or Poor Hearing) Raised by bandits (Well Equipped Wealth, Bad Reputation, Enemy; Stigma Bandit] planetary climate shift Ieft you in the cold and starv ing for years (BOD Scrounge +1_ Survival +1] You became an accomplished hunter [Archery +1 Perception Yours was particularly hostile world (Throwing Weapons +1, Brawling +1|] Swallowed your pride and went to school in town (Academic Any +1, Language/Affiliation +1, Gregarious= Worked as scout for the Iocal garrison [Well: Equipped; Comms Conv Tactics / Infantry +1] Uncovered lostech cachel [Choose either: Vehicle Owns Vehicle and Custom Vehicle; or Wealth and Well-Equipped] [Choose one event or roll twice and apply both results]
STAGE 2 LATE CHILDHOOD This stage is turbulent time for most young people their bodies grow toward adulthood and their minds struggle to keep UP, In some affiliations_ early vocational training takes place at this stage, teaching advanced career skills to children who are still relatively young: Other affiliations leave these youths to their own devices: some excel and some fall between the cracks of society: Tlme: Upon completion of this stage tne character is six teen years Old. Continuation: Characters follow only one path at this stage and then go on to Higher Education or Real Life as desired You can also end the Life Path here ad play your character as teenager; in this case_ proceed to Assigning Attributes Traits and Skills (p. 54). Clan Characters: In Stage trueborn characters who have not washed out of training must take the Trueborn Sibko Path Freeborn characters who want t0 become warriors must enter the Freeborn Sibko Path Other freeborn characters con- tinue their upbringing by taking Clan Apprenticeship_ except for dark caste characters_ who follow the norma path rules tor Inner Sphere characters beyond Stage
CLAN APPRENTICESHIP Clan Affiliation only The Clan civilian caste places considerable emphasis on vocational training along with traditional knowledge-based edu- cation; The most common form the apprenticeship where child works alongside knowledgeable tradesman for several hours each day: Attribute Mlnlmums: Scientist caste INT 4; technician caste, DEX 4; merchant caste, CHA laborer caste , BOD Skills: Academic /Clan History +1_ Administration +1 Interest /Any +1 and two other skills by caste: scientist; Academic Any +2 MedTech +1; technician; Technician / Any 2, Scrounge +1; merchant: Negotiation Appraisal laborer: Career /Any +2, Computers +1 Next Path: Scientist caste University (31; technician caste: Technical College (3); merchant caste: Trade School (3 Merchant Field only); laborer caste: Trade School (3 not Merchant Field)
BACK WOODS Perhaps you grew Up in the wilderness or ran away from your family: Maybe you washed out of your sibko and fled to the bandit caste. For whatever reason_ your character retreat- ed from society into the wilderness. Living off the Iand you learned practical survival skills rather than the academics common to most children your age_
